case_title: MARVIN MOUTON VS. SAN FRANCISCO AUTOMOTIVE ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-27-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF MARVIN MOUTON IS PRESENT. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT JIMMY CHO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-27-2017 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED DEC-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHO, JIMMY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOUTON, MARVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHO, JIMMY $3,300.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,350.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO JIMMY CHO ON 01/27/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,300.00 FILED BY MOUTON, MARVIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOMOTIVE CHO, JIMMY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-27-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MOUTON, MARVIN
DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF DISMISSING DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOMOTIVE FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUTON, MARVIN
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOUTON, MARVIN AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO AUTOMOTIVE
